# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Validate file type/content, control storage paths, and apply safe size and processing limits.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Allowlist file types using trusted server-side validation, not just filename extensions.
- Generate server-side filenames and store uploads outside directly executable/public paths when appropriate.
- Apply size limits, content checks, archive safety checks, and image/document processing safeguards.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust only the original filename or extension.
- Do not store uploads in a public/executable path under a user-controlled name.
- Do not allow unlimited file sizes or dangerous archive extraction behavior.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Secure User File Upload
 * Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents securely
 * Version: 1.0
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class SecureUserFileUpload {
    
    private $upload_dir;
    private $allowed_types = [
        'image/jpeg',
        'image/png',
        'image/gif',
        'application/pdf',
        'application/msword',
        'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
        'application/vnd.ms-excel',
        'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
        'text/plain'
    ];
    
    private $max_file_size = 10485760; // 10MB
    
    public function __construct() {
        $this->upload_dir = WP_CONTENT_DIR . '/uploads/user-files/';
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', [$this, 'enqueue_scripts']);
        add_action('wp_ajax_upload_user_file', [$this, 'handle_file_upload']);
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_upload_user_file', [$this, 'handle_file_upload']);
        $this->create_upload_directory();
    }
    
    private function create_upload_directory() {
        if (!file_exists($this->upload_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($this->upload_dir);
        }
    }
    
    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_script('jquery');
        wp_enqueue_script('user-file-upload', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'js/upload.js', ['jquery'], '1.0', true);
        wp_localize_script('user-file-upload', 'ajax_object', [
            'ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce' => wp_create_nonce('user_file_upload_nonce')
        ]);
    }
    
    public function handle_file_upload() {
        check_ajax_referer('user_file_upload_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die('Unauthorized');
        }
        
        if (!isset($_FILES['file'])) {
            wp_die('No file uploaded');
        }
        
        $file = $_FILES['file'];
        
        if ($file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            wp_die('Upload error: ' . $this->get_upload_error_message($file['error']));
        }
        
        if ($file['size'] > $this->max_file_size) {
            wp_die('File too large. Maximum size is 10MB.');
        }
        
        $file_type = $this->get_file_type($file['tmp_name']);
        
        if (!in_array($file_type, $this->allowed_types)) {
            wp_die('Invalid file type. Allowed types: images, PDF, DOC, XLS, TXT');
        }
        
        $filename = $this->generate_safe_filename($file['name']);
        $upload_path = $this->upload_dir . $filename;
        
        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $upload_path)) {
            wp_die('Failed to move uploaded file');
        }
        
        $response = [
            'success' => true,
            'message' => 'File uploaded successfully',
            'filename' => $filename,
            'url' => content_url('uploads/user-files/' . $filename)
        ];
        
        wp_send_json($response);
    }
    
    private function get_file_type($file_path) {
        $finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $mime_type = finfo_file($finfo, $file_path);
        finfo_close($finfo);
        return $mime_type;
    }
    
    private function generate_safe_filename($original_name) {
        $extension = pathinfo($original_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION);
        $safe_name = sanitize_file_name(pathinfo($original_name, PATHINFO_FILENAME));
        $timestamp = time();
        $random_string = wp_generate_password(12, false);
        return $safe_name . '_' . $timestamp . '_' . $random_string . '.' . $extension;
    }
    
    private function get_upload_error_message($error_code) {
        switch ($error_code) {
            case UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE:
                return 'The uploaded file exceeds the upload_max_filesize directive in php.ini';
            case UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE:
                return 'The uploaded file exceeds the MAX_FILE_SIZE directive that was specified in the HTML form';
            case UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL:
                return 'The uploaded file was only partially uploaded';
            case UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE:
                return 'No file was uploaded';
            case UPLOAD_ERR_NO_TMP_DIR:
                return 'Missing a temporary folder';
            case UPLOAD_ERR_CANT_WRITE:
                return 'Failed to write file to disk';
            case UPLOAD_ERR_EXTENSION:
                return 'File upload stopped by extension';
            default:
                return 'Unknown upload error';
        }
    }
}

new SecureUserFileUpload();
?>
